inline_comments.message: For new requirements, please update to include the additional metadata.  introduced, impacts (if known), and validtion_mode (static).

Sorry, I think the metadata still requires some changes.

I think target should be XNF PACKAGE, but we did have a VNF Package.  Maybe we can confirm with the team on the daily call if we need to introduce a new target or if all VNF Package targets should simply be XNF Package.

If we don't know the impacts, then we can exclude it vs. including None.  

validation_mode would be static since we're validating the package.  The validation_mode isn't meant to imply if a test case exists or not - just how it would be validated when written.

introduced should be all lower case. Full details here: https://wiki.onap.org/display/DW/VNFRQTS+Requirement+and+Documentation+Standards
